name: default
description: Plan Verification Report prose shape emitted by the plan-verifier agent: a Plan/Goal/Verdict header, requirement coverage, gaps, extras, file references, ordering issues, task-quality notes, and a verdict rationale. Empty sections render 'None' rather than being omitted. Arrays are rendered to repeated rows before substitution.

slots.description: Requirement-to-task coverage rows; rendered to repeated bullets.
Coverage status, e.g. 'Task N ✓' or 'NOT COVERED ✗'.
Gaps — what is missing and why it matters; one numbered entry each. Write 'None' if empty.
Tasks not justified by any requirement; one numbered entry each. Write 'None' if empty.
Referenced paths and their existence status; one row each. Write 'None' if empty.
A path referenced by the plan.
Ordering violations (forward references, dependency before definition); one row each. Write 'None' if empty.
Task-quality problems (missing verification, placeholder language); one row each. Write 'None' if empty.
2-3 sentences; if FAIL, the most critical reason.
